description: M-26-14 Element 3: Detects anomalous alert silence per Appendix B category (low_count, 6h)

detectors.detector_description: Anomalously low alert count by M-26-14 Appendix B category

custom_settings.m_26_14_requirement: Element 3 — Collection Operations | Appendix B §5(k) Coverage Verification
custom_settings.m_26_14_prerequisite: Denormalized m_26_14.category field must be written to .alerts-security.* by ingest pipeline before job can partition correctly. Array-valued kibana.alert.rule.tags cannot be used as partition field in ML.
custom_settings.m_26_14_acceptance_criteria: Detects category silence within one 6h bucket. Learns weekly seasonality within 14 days to reduce weekend FP rate by >=80%.
custom_settings.m_26_14_description: M-26-14 Element 3: Detects anomalous absence of security alerts per M-26-14 Appendix B category over time. Builds a time-series model of expected alert volume per category — distinguishes genuine silence from historically-quiet-but-normal periods including weekly seasonality. Complements the ES|QL K-rule (point-in-time) and the companion Watcher (zero-count) by providing statistically-anomalous silence detection. M-26-14 §5(k) coverage verification. Required for Element 3 L2+ compliance health monitoring. NOTE: Requires m_26_14.category denormalized keyword field in .alerts-security.* — see preprocessing pipeline m_26_14-alert-category-pipeline.
